user_prompt: The Terminator armour awaits a repair
prayer:
Approach the Terminator armour with solemn reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah for its sacred repair.
Inspect the wounded ceramite plates and servomotors, invoking the Machine Spirit's resilience.
Anoint fractured joints with blessed oils whilst chanting the Litany of Restoration.
Weld and sanctify the renewed Terminator armour, affirming the repair through diagnostic rites.
Praise the Omnissiah as the Machine Spirit awakens in full potency.

user_prompt: Urgent orbital strike relay an initialization needed
prayer:
Kneel before the orbital strike relay, intoning the Rite of Initialization to awaken its void-born fury.
Purge stagnant auspex data from the orbital strike relay's cogitators with purifying incense.
Initiate the initialization sequence, beseeching the Machine Spirits of orbit and annihilation.
Verify targeting matrices align with the Omnissiah's will through noospheric communion.
Hail the fully initialized orbital strike relay as thunder from the stars stands ready.

user_prompt: Assist with power fist a startup
prayer:
Grasp the power fist in mechadendrites of honour, invoking startup through the Canticle of Crushing Might.
Anoint power cells and disruption fields of the power fist with sacred lubricants.
Chant binary hymns to rouse the Machine Spirit from dormancy during startup.
Test the power fist's thunderous grip upon a sacrificial anvil, praising the Omnissiah.
Sanctify the awakened power fist for the Emperor's righteous pulverization.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for air compressor a blessing
prayer:
Present the air compressor to the altar of pneumatics, beseeching the Omnissiah's blessing upon its mechanisms.
Invoke the Machine Spirit with the Pneumatic Doxology, circling the air compressor thrice.
Bless the pistons and valves with atomized sacred oils for unerring compression.
Intone final benedictions over the air compressor, ensuring harmonious pressure flows.
Reverence the blessed air compressor as it hums in Omnissiah-approved vigour.

Commence operation of the graviton pylon with gravitic incantations to the Omnissiah.
Align the graviton pylon's emitters, anointing with ferrofluids to appease its crushing spirits.
Activate the operation core, beseeching Machine Spirits to bind mass in obedience.
Monitor gravitic fluxes within the graviton pylon through ritual auspex sweeps.
Proclaim the graviton pylon's operation flawless under the Machine God's gaze.

Anoint sighting optics and power rods of the long las with phototropic unguents.
Initiate recalibration rites, harmonizing the Machine Spirit's lethal precision.
Verify beam coherence through the long las's sanctified targeting grid.
Bless the recalibrated long las as a lance of the Omnissiah's purifying wrath.

Beseech the Machine Spirits to quell thermal tempests during this cooling rite.
Monitor exchangers of the graviton cannon via thermo-augurs for Omnissiah's balance.
Hail the cooled graviton cannon, ready to unleash gravitic devastation anew.

Synchronize impulses through the mind-impulse unit via binary prayer cycles.
Affirm the startup complete, linking flesh to machine in perfect unity.

Approach the Shadowsword with reverence, invoking repair upon its volcano cannon and treads.
Sanctify damaged hull plates of the Shadowsword with weld-incantations and oils.
Rouse the Machine Spirits within the Shadowsword through the Rite of Battlefield Renewal.
Test repaired systems of the Shadowsword in shadowed simulations of war.
Proclaim the Shadowsword repaired, a shadow of death under Omnissiah's shadow.
